title: Medhuvaga Thaan Lyrics Kochadaiiyaan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Movie: Kochadaiyaan,
Music: AR Rahman,
Singer: SPB, Sadhana Sargam,
Lyrics: Vaalee, 
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Medhuvaga thaan, medhuvaga thaan
ennai eerkiraai, palivaangavaa (2)

Mayilaasanam aruginil naaney
mazhai megamaai irangi vandheney
un vizhi oraththil,
vilundhu vitteney naan.

Medhuvaga thaan, medhuvaga thaan
ennai eerkiraai, ennai vaangavaa

Annam ada vannam
azhagai sindhum mara vindham.
Manjam ezhudhaa manmadham
ival azhagu.

ettum dhisai ettum
dhinam kattum pari vattam
innum solla mozhi illaye.

Kodi vendumaa, kudai vendumaa
un maar pola yaavum sugam agumaa?
padai vendumaa, pagai vendumaa
unnai pol veeltha aal yedhu.

Enai vella yaarum illai
unnai andri dhisaigal vellum isaiye

Aadhi andha maadi vandha
jodhi indha azhaga- vaanam thaandi
vaiyyam konda yeram potta
malardhaan ival allavaa..

Raanaa .. raanaa..
ennai konja raanaa
unnai minja aanaa
azhagu pogum veenaa neram
po po veenaa.

thottu vandha mullai
vittu vaithadhillai
konjum anbu thollai
kaattum inba ellai.

Aadhi andha maadi vandha
jodhi indha azhaga- vaanam thaandi
vaiyyam konda yeram potta
malardhaan ival allavaa..

ival azhagu.

padai vendumaa, pagai vendumaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Medhuvaga Thaan?

The song Medhuvaga Thaan expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, highlighting the emotions of longing and affection.

How does this song fit into the plot of Kochadaiiyaan?

In Kochadaiiyaan, this song serves as a romantic interlude that showcases the blossoming relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of Medhuvaga Thaan?

The song features the talented voices of Sadhana Sargam and SPB, with music composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was Medhuvaga Thaan released?

Medhuvaga Thaan was released on March 10, 2014, as part of the Kochadaiiyaan soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Medhuvaga Thaan, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the soulful voices of Sadhana Sargam and SPB. The song unfolds in Kochadaiiyaan as a heartfelt expression of longing and affection, perfectly complementing the film's narrative. With AR Rahman's enchanting music, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This melody is a celebration of love, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Medhuvaga Thaan from Kochadaiiyaan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Sadhana Sargam and SPB, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the romantic vibes that make this track a must-listen for every lovebird.
stanzaMeanings: I am being called sweetly, sweetly, will you accept me?
Like a rain cloud, I have come near you, I have fallen into your eyes.
I am being called sweetly, sweetly, will you accept me?
The food has a beautiful color, it brings joy. The beauty of this girl is like a poem written in the sky.
Every direction, every day, there are still words left to say.
Do you want a flag, do you want an umbrella? Will everything be fine like you? Do you want an army, do you want peace? Who can match your beauty?
No one can defeat me, except you, the music will win over all directions.
Oh, that beautiful girl who came down from the sky, she is like a flower that blooms in the world beyond the heavens.
Oh, my dear, my dear, will you come to me? Your beauty will shine like a melody, come, come, my melody.
The jasmine that came to me has not left, a little love shows the joy of life.
Oh, that beautiful girl who came down from the sky, she is like a flower that blooms in the world beyond the heavens.
The food has a beautiful color, it brings joy. The beauty of this girl is like a poem written in the sky.
Every direction, every day, there are still words left to say.
Do you want a flag, do you want an umbrella? Will everything be fine like you? Do you want an army, do you want peace? Who can match your beauty?
I am being called sweetly, sweetly, will you accept me?
I am being called sweetly, sweetly, will you accept me?
